subject: Context: Series B closed January 2026
body:
Sam,

StreamlineOps has doubled open engineering roles since January's Series B, especially for Kafka and Spark.

Companies in your position often struggle to find experienced data engineers immediately.

Tenacious provides pre-vetted Kafka and Spark talent ready to deploy.

How are you currently handling the increased demand for specialized data engineering talent?

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
